scripts.copy-static: mkdir -p dist/pages dist/style dist/assets && cp src/index.html dist/index.html && cp -R src/pages/. dist/pages/ && cp -R src/style/. dist/style/ && cp -R assets/. dist/assets/
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run copy-static
scripts.watch: npm run copy-static && concurrently -k -n static,ts "npm run watch:static" "npm run watch:ts"
